name: Marble Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate, butterscotch, and peanut butter in a large glass bowl.
2. Microwave on medium for 5 minutes. Stir until everything is melted.
3. Gently fold in the marshmallows and peanuts. Pour the mixture into a buttered 13 x 9 inch pan.
4. Allow to set in the refrigerator for several hours or until firm. Cut into squares.
